title: Yaaro Yaaro Lyrics Meaghamann Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Yaaro Yaaro
Movie :Meaghamann
Singer : Megha
Music : SS Thaman
Lyrics : Eknaath

Ye mugamae dhaano
mugamudi dhaano
kandu kondaal moolum poro.

Oru ragasiya
arakkan avanthaanaa ?
avan
ragasiyam arindhavan ivandhaana?
yudham inidhaanaa?

Ye thaedal paadhi
koodalum meedhi
oodal kondu vandhaen naaney.

ye dhaegam paadhi
thaevaigal meedhi
yaarai vendru poven naaney

Idhu valayil seerum vagaithaanda
un vilayai meerum kalaidhaanda
arugae vaayengaa

Ingae nijangal illae vaadaa
un nizhzzhum poiye podaa
indha boomi melae
boogambathin idaththai sollu needaa

Idhu singam puli modhal
idhu sinangal konda kaadhal

varipulikku yedhu saadhal
nee thaedum kadhavu theriyaadhe
nee thatti paarrkka mudiyaadhe
tholvi kidayaadhe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Yaaro Yaaro?

The song Yaaro Yaaro explores themes of love and longing, questioning the nature of relationships and emotions.

What is the plot context of the song in Meaghamann?

In Meaghamann, the song reflects the protagonist's inner turmoil and emotional struggles, enhancing the film's narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Megha and composed by Thaman S, known for his impactful music in Tamil cinema.

When was Yaaro Yaaro released?

Yaaro Yaaro was released on August 15, 2014, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaaro Yaaro, the protagonist grapples with feelings of love and uncertainty, encapsulated in a poignant melody. The song serves as a reflective moment in Meaghamann, where the character's emotional state is laid bare through Megha's expressive vocals. The lyrics, penned by Eknaath, delve into the complexities of relationships, evoking a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. This track beautifully conveys the essence of longing, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaaro Yaaro from Meaghamann is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of longing and introspection. With Megha's soulful voice and Thaman S's evocative composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love's complexities. Dive into the emotional depths of this track that beautifully intertwines lyrics and melody.
stanzaMeanings: Who is it? Do they know the people and places?
Is this face the same as the one seen before? If recognized, will everything change?
Is he a secretive person? Does he know the secret? Is this a pleasant fight?
Meaghamann, Meaghamann, are you afraid? Meaghamann, Meaghamann, shall we play?
Meaghamann, Meaghamann, is the woman's anger yours? Meaghamann, Meaghamann, shall we fight?
I have come with half the search and half the gathering.
I will go to whoever needs half of this body.
This is a circle that will bring your game to an end, don't let it slip away.
Meaghamann, Meaghamann, are you afraid? Meaghamann, Meaghamann, shall we play?
Meaghamann, Meaghamann, is the woman's anger yours? Meaghamann, Meaghamann, shall we fight?
Here, we are not real, go away, your lies will fall on this earth, tell the truth about the place of deception.
This is the lion, the tiger, and the first love of the heart.
In the union, the seed will show.
Don't seek the door for the trap, don't look back, don't let the escape be lost.
Meaghamann, Meaghamann, are you afraid? Meaghamann, Meaghamann, shall we play?
Meaghamann, Meaghamann, is the woman's anger yours? Meaghamann, Meaghamann, shall we fight?
